prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a cheerful young Japanese woman wearing a cute sailor-style school-uniform-inspired dress. She has warm medium brown short bob hair with wispy bangs, clear fair skin, large brown eyes, and a gentle smile. She stands centered on a bright modern Japanese shopping street in daytime, leaning slightly toward the camera and making a peace sign beside her face with her left hand while her right hand lightly holds the edge of her skirt. Her outfit is a navy one-piece sailor dress with short puff sleeves, a white sailor collar with navy stripe details, a large cream bow at the chest, a fitted waist, a flared skirt, and a cream layered ruffle hem; add dark knee-high socks barely visible at the bottom. Use a natural full-body-to-thigh portrait crop, camera slightly above waist height, shallow depth of field, soft natural sunlight, realistic skin texture, crisp focus on the subject, blurred pedestrians and storefronts in the background, urban street perspective receding behind her, clean fashion-photo composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people in focus.
